content.en:
Ye Tian was unwilling to fight with those three god generals, otherwise it would cause turmoil, and it would be difficult for him to cultivate in the Ancient Demon Cave, so he had to obtain an Ancient Demon Order.

Although the Ancient Demon Decree is rare, it is not really few, the fourth deity has found a strong person with the Ancient Demon Order, with the strength of the fourth deity that is now comparable to the Seven Star Earth Venerable, it is easy to kill that human venerable and snatch the ancient demon spirit.

Although that person died unjustly, Ye Tian is not a pedantic person, and when it comes to chance, he will not be soft.

Moreover, the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe are now in a hostile relationship, and the small-scale level battles are continuous, and I don't know how many strong people have fallen, and even some members of the Heavenly Pavilion have fallen a lot when they enter the Cangyu Universe.

Therefore, killing a human powerhouse of the Cangyu Universe is nothing.

Now.

Ye Tian was waiting for the fourth deity to come and send the Ancient Demon Order, once the Ancient Demon Order was in hand, he could refine the Ancient Demon Order and enter the Ancient Demon Cave openly.

Time passed little by little, and it didn't take long for the fourth deity to arrive.

The fourth deity handed the Ancient Demon Order to Ye Tian and left again.

When the Ancient Demon Order was in hand, Ye Tian began to refine it, and it was easy to refine the Ancient Demon Order.

In fact, there is nothing special about the Ancient Demon Order, it is just a relatively strong token, which is engraved with some law patterns and the aura of many god generals, even other god generals are difficult to forge.

This is just a voucher and has no other use than to enter the Ancient Demon Cave.

After Ye Tian refined the Ancient Demon Order, he flew to the Ancient Demon Cave, and covered his breath, and even used the Heaven Covering Stone to shield himself and the aura of the Ancient Universe, as well as cause and effect.

In this way, even the god general level would not be able to know his identity, otherwise he would definitely be discovered if he was full of the aura of the ancient universe, even if he had the ancient demon order, it would be impossible for the three god generals to let him enter the ancient demon cave.

After being foolproof, Ye Tian came to the Ancient Demon Cave.

Although the three god generals are guarding the ancient demon cave, these three god generals also need to cultivate, and they will not manage the affairs of the ancient demon cave in and out, and the one who really controls the entry and exit of the ancient demon cave is a ten-star earth venerable.

This ten-star Earth Venerable sat cross-legged at the entrance of the Ancient Demon Cave, and the others had to hold the Ancient Demon Order before they could enter the Ancient Demon Cave.

And this ten-star Earth Venerable is also a famous ten-star Earth Venerable in the Cangyu Universe - the Golden Sword Earth Venerable!

Ye Tian concealed his breath and only revealed the strength of an ordinary Earth Venerable, this Golden Sword Earth Venerable only glanced at Ye Tian, and said, "Ancient Demon Order!"

Ye Tian took out the Ancient Demon Order, handed it to the Golden Sword Earth Venerable, and entered the Ancient Demon Order.

An ancient magic order is only allowed to enter the ancient demon cave once, once it comes out, the next time you want to enter, you also need an ancient magic order.

Because of this, the major holy places make a lot of money just by charging fees to enter the cave.

Inside the Ancient Demon Cave.

As soon as Ye Tian stepped in, he felt the extremely rich ancient demon vitality, and these ancient demon vitality frantically poured into Ye Tian's body, wanting to refine his physical body.

"The Ancient Demon Yuan Qi should be a special Yuan Qi formed by the combination of the Yuan Qi and the Ancient Demon Qi, and in terms of the degree of body refining, it is even a few points better than the Chaos Yuan Qi. Moreover, the ancient demon vitality here is very strong, and it is really a good place to refine the body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Ancient Demon Cave is called the Cave, but in fact, the area here is very large, like a big world, and the center of the Ancient Demon Cave is the black Ancient Demon Tower, exuding an incomparably terrifying aura, piercing through the Ancient Demon Void, and the endless power of rules connects the entire Ancient Demon Cave.

"Let's not go to the Ancient Demon Tower, find a place to cultivate here, once I fuse a large amount of Ancient Demon Yuan Qi, and stay here for a few more years, the breath on my body will be close to the Cangyu Universe, otherwise if I really want to do it, even if there is a Heaven Covering Stone, there is no way to cover my body of the Ancient Universe Breath!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, this is also a good place, and it is not a waste of time to cultivate the Xuanxuan Technique.

The Ancient Demon Cave is huge, but there aren't many cultivators here.

Although there are many cultivators in the Holy Land, even the disciples of the Holy Land need to pay some price if they want to enter the Ancient Demon Cave, and the situation in the Cangyu Universe is similar to that of the Ancient Universe now, in the thirteenth universe era, the physical body cultivation is suppressed, unless it is an Earth Venerable, it is difficult to improve the strength of the physical body at all.

And the biggest opportunity in the Ancient Demon Cave is the Ancient Demon Tower, but if you want to challenge the Ancient Demon Tower, it is also difficult, and the strength is not enough, so you can't break through at all. Many Earth Venerables have been to the Ancient Demon Cave and will not come again in a short time.

Besides, there are countless opportunities in the Cangyu Universe, and the Ancient Demon Cave is only one of them, and it is impossible for them all to converge here.

Therefore, there are not many earth honors in the ancient demon cave.

Ye Tian found a place at random, took out a palace, and began to retreat and cultivate here.

With the assistance of a large number of ancient demon vitality and many elixirs, the third layer of Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Technique began to slowly improve from the beginning to the Xiaocheng realm, and the strength of his physical body also slowly increased.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian was still in retreat and cultivating, and some big things had happened in the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe.

Eternal Universe.

The Stone Dragon Holy Land was facing a big crisis, three strong men in black robes entered the Stone Dragon Holy Land, many Earth Venerables fell, none of them were their opponents, and the entire Holy Land was pierced.

"Who are you?"

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord appeared and roared angrily.

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord is also the original Stone Dragon Supreme, and now his strength has gone one step further, and he is already a ten-star top Earth Venerable, and he is not far from the ten-star Extreme Earth Venerable.

If you don't enter the god general level, you can't be called a real powerhouse in the era of the dual universe, and you will fall at any time.

Previously, the Divine Dragon of the Universe would fall into the Eternal Universe, and many Earth Lords believed that within tens of thousands of years, the Divine Generals of the Cangyu Universe should not dare to rashly wage war against the Eternal Universe.

But now, these three have entered the Stone Dragon Holy Land, which makes the Stone Dragon Holy Lord guess that these three should be the powerhouses of the Cangyu Universe.

"My name is Zhang Ling, a member of the Hidden God Organization, the Stone Dragon Holy Lord, you also hunted down and killed the reincarnated people of our Hidden God Organization, and one of them died at your hands. Hmph, the fact that you have been able to live to this era is the opportunity given to you by our Venerable, I didn't expect you to dare to hunt down and kill the reincarnated people of our Tibetan God Organization, you are simply looking for death!"

Zhang Ling roared angrily.

Naturally, he didn't avenge the reincarnation, but just to show his prestige, he didn't dare to find the Lord of the Yuangu, because the Lord of the Yuangu had also stepped into the gods, and he had many earth lords to serve him, and his power was huge.

He had just been promoted to the god general level, his strength was limited, and he didn't have many subordinates available, so he could naturally only trouble the Stone Dragon Holy Lord.

"What, Hidden God Organization!"

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord's face changed drastically.

In the era of the dual universe, the two universes competed with each other, and almost forgot about the Tibetan God Organization, and now they really understand that the Tibetan God Organization is the biggest threat in the dual universe era.

Before, those reincarnated people were too weak, but now these reincarnations are probably basically above the ten-star earth venerable, and even god-level powerhouses have been born.

"Yuan Gu God General, there is a strong person from the Tibetan God Organization to kill me!"

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord sent a message to the Yuan Gu Divine General.

But at this time, Zhang Ling had already noticed it, and without saying a word, he did it directly.

With a sword falling, the body of the Stone Dragon Holy Lord was pierced, and the body flew upside down for hundreds of millions of miles, and the entire holy land was completely destroyed.

Another sword fell, and the Stone Dragon Holy Lord was wounded again.

"One Star God Will !!"

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord realized that he couldn't wait for the rescue of the Yuan Gu Divine General.

The next moment.

The Stone Dragon Holy Lord's eyes showed a trace of heartache, and he took out a wooden card, urging the wooden card, and the whole person disappeared.

"What, escaped?"

Zhang Ling was furious.

For a moment, he was careless and let the Stone Dragon Holy Lord escape, it should be a life-saving treasure, and he moved away in an instant, and even he couldn't stop him.

"Damn, if he prepares a treasure that seals time and space, he won't be able to escape at all!"

Zhang Ling said angrily.

It's a pity that he underestimated the Stone Dragon Holy Lord too much, thinking that with his one-star divine general's strength, it shouldn't take a few tricks to kill a ten-star Earth Venerable, but he didn't expect the Stone Dragon Holy Lord to use his strongest life-saving thing so simply.
